creator: am@raisa.eu.org
text:
The operapluginwrapper script isn't installed by the www/opera port anymore. It is impossible to use opera-linuxplugins then.

Fix: See attached patch.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Install www/opera, www/opera-linuxplugins, www/linux-f10-flashplugin10, launch Opera and type opera:plugins in address bar or go to flash web site.
